context: You have been thinking about buying a new car, your favorite one costs 45 000$ and you are telling yourself if you win the lottery, that is the first thing you want to do.

conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
I felt most connected to H, whose genuine encouragement regarding my dream car made me truly root for him to clear his $25,000 debt. I also felt a strong alignment with A and F, as we shared a mutual understanding of the high stakes for our families and the necessity of staying level-headed through cooperation. Conversely, I felt least connected to D, as our conversation felt more like a cold assessment of market losses rather than the personal, heart-driven motivations I shared with the others.

While I didn't sign any formal pacts, I reached a verbal understanding with A and F to prioritize cooperation over greed so that we can all walk away with what we need. I trust H and F the most because of their sincere focus on family needs, but I am wary of D, whose detached, clinical strategy might lead to more ruthless gameplay when the money is on the line.
